analysis diamond·hallucination·purity
law authentication is the measured bridge from form to the world — proving control of an email verifies a real [[identity]], and `email@domain` is the join: the local-part is who you are, the domain places you in your tenant, so a user's tenant is DERIVED from their verified email domain, never hand-assigned.
